name: side-link-preview
description: Chrome extension that opens target="_blank" links in the Side Panel — an Arc-style / Edge-style split view for stock Chrome.

scripts.zip: mkdir -p dist && zip -r "dist/side-link-preview-$(node -p \"require('./manifest.json').version\").zip" manifest.json background.js content.js injected.js sidepanel.html sidepanel.js options.html options.js i18n.js locales icons PRIVACY.md LICENSE README.md -x '*.DS_Store' 'icons/icon-square.png'
